{{Infobox character
| name = Rojric
| aliases = Rojric Marten
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = prisoner
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Rojric Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Rojric [[Marten]] is a man characterized by his red [[Izyrian]] hair and a closely trimmed red beard. He is the father of [[Calder Marten]]. Rojric's [[life]] involved periods of hardship on the streets, followed by a time in a facility at [[Candle Bay]] where he received medical care and regular meals. However, his experiences there were marked by extreme suffering; he was subjected to alchemical experiments that caused him such intense agony that he attempted to end his own [[life]] multiple times to escape the pain. His legal troubles began when he was arrested by [[Watch-leader Fitch]] for attempting to buy stolen property belonging to [[the Emperor]]. Despite his later appearance of improved health, he remained a prisoner in a red jumpsuit. Ultimately, Rojric was brought before [[the Emperor]] and sentenced to death, at which point his [[life]] was taken by a sudden, piercing sound.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Rojric is a [[Marten]] and the father of [[Calder]]. After going missing, it was eventually revealed that he had been taken and held as a prisoner within the [[Candle Bay Imperial Prison]] and Reformative Facility. While incarcerated in a cell, the pale-skinned man with red [[Izyrian]] hair met his end. His death was marked by an audible shriek that sounded as if the world were being torn in half.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] is [[Calder]]'s father.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] is a [[Marten]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] is missing.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] was taken.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c10">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] [[Marten]] is a resident of the [[Candle Bay Imperial Prison]] and Reformative Facility.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c13">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] [[Marten]] is [[Calder]]'s father and a prisoner.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] [[Marten]] is held in a cell.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] [[Marten]] has pale skin and red [[Izyrian]] hair.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c21">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Rojric]] [[Marten]] died with an audible shriek that seemed to tear the world in half.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c26">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Rojric]] [[Marten]] was killed on [[the Emperor]]'s orders.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c5">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
